title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that programming language selection significantly affects AI team productivity, particularly as teams scale. The video advocates for TypeScript over Python, citing benefits of language server protocols, type checking, and compile-time error detection to reduce runtime mistakes in AI coding.
